div.div:
Environment Sizing
DEV: 512 vCPU / 1024 MB (1-2 inst)
PROD: 1024 vCPU / 2048 MB (1-3 inst)
Shared: VPC, RDS, NAT, VPC Connector
Separate: ECR repos, S3, SSM params
